creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Second part of pr fix.  Similar patch already applied to net/netpipes.
I suppose if anyone really used both of these, they can come up with a better suggestion, but this should be an easy, simple 
solution in the mean time.
-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
SECNAP Network Security Corporation
http://people.freebsd.org/~scheidell
